hero.headline: Your story,

hero.description: ELB Creative is a full-service creative studio offering copywriting, content strategy, social media, photography, web design, and more.

about.text: I'm Anna — a writer, content strategist, and creative professional with a background in English literature, lifestyle media, and real estate marketing.
about.quote: Great creative work doesn't just look good — it makes people feel something.

notification: Now accepting new clients — Ontario & Atlanta
